name: Stripe payment → Invoice PDF → Gmail + Google Drive

parameters.content:
### Stripe payment → Invoice PDF → Gmail + Google Drive
Automatically generate and deliver professional invoice PDFs when a Stripe payment succeeds.

**Full tutorial:** [pdftemplateapi.com/n8n/automate-invoices](https://pdftemplateapi.com/n8n/automate-invoices)

### How it works
1. **Stripe Trigger** fires on every successful checkout session
2. **HTTP Request** fetches the line items for that session
3. **Code** node formats the data to match your invoice template fields
4. **TemplateFox** generates a branded PDF invoice
5. Invoice is **emailed** to the customer and **saved to Google Drive**

### Setup
- [ ] Add your **Stripe Secret Key** (`sk_live_` or `sk_test_`) from [dashboard.stripe.com/apikeys](https://dashboard.stripe.com/apikeys)
- [ ] Install the **TemplateFox** community node (`n8n-nodes-templatefox`)
- [ ] Add your **TemplateFox** API key — [get one free](https://app.pdftemplateapi.com)
- [ ] Connect **Gmail** OAuth2
- [ ] Connect **Google Drive** OAuth2
- [ ] Select your invoice template in the TemplateFox node
- [ ] Set your company details directly in the template (not in the Code node)
- [ ] Set your **Google Drive folder ID** in the Google Drive node

### Customize
- Change the email body in the Gmail node
- Adjust the invoice number format in the Code node
- Add a Slack notification node after Google Drive for team alerts

## 1. Receive payment
Stripe fires a webhook when a checkout session completes.

## 2. Fetch & format data
Retrieve line items from Stripe and format them for the invoice template.

## 3. Generate & deliver
Create the PDF and send it via email + save to Drive.

parameters.subject: =Your Invoice {{ $('Format Invoice Data').first().json.invoice_number }}
